name: sj-design
description: Studio Joe design expert plugin — sj-design-expert is a builder/coder/consultant/reviewer in one: generates Apple-style slide decks, motion primitives, emoji visualizations, and WebGPU scenes (self-contained HTML), and codes/consults/reviews in the Studio Joe design system using patterns distilled from real shipped projects across web, WebGPU, Chrome/Safari, macOS, and iOS. Includes ingest-design-source, the repeatable pipeline that feeds new sources into the expert.
